title: High-Res End Flash
description: Increases the resolution of the end flashes by 10x in each dimension.
body:
The vanilla end flash texture is 64x64px. This kind of looks out of place, since the rest of the sky has a much higher resolution.

This resource pack scales up the flash to be 640x640px, making the flash look smooth.

# Before
![The vanilla end flash texture.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e103ae0e02416577a8aa49da09900261fac61c62_0.webp)

# After
![The modified end flash texture.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/595f0dd330c1c22c0fb05df1147dd24a6e30ca7c_0.webp)
